Class OrderServiceImpl

java.lang.Object
com.gcu.inventoryapp.service.impl.OrderServiceImpl
All Implemented Interfaces:
OrderService
@Service public class OrderServiceImpl extends Object implements OrderService
Service implementation responsible for handling order-related business logic. Provides operations for retrieving, saving, and filtering orders.

    • getAllOrders

      public List<OrderHeader> getAllOrders()
      Retrieves all orders from the database.
      Specified by:
      getAllOrders in interface OrderService
      Returns:
      a list of all orders

    • getOrderById

      public Optional<OrderHeader> getOrderById(Long id)
      Retrieves an order by its ID.
      Specified by:
      getOrderById in interface OrderService
      Parameters:
      id - the ID of the order
      Returns:
      an Optional containing the order if found, otherwise empty

    • saveOrder

      public OrderHeader saveOrder(OrderHeader orderHeader)
      Saves a new or existing order to the database.
      Specified by:
      saveOrder in interface OrderService
      Parameters:
      orderHeader - the order to save
      Returns:
      the saved order with updated ID

    • getOrdersByDateRange

      public List<OrderHeader> getOrdersByDateRange(LocalDateTime start, LocalDateTime end)
      Retrieves orders within a specified date range.
      Specified by:
      getOrdersByDateRange in interface OrderService
      Parameters:
      start - the start date and time
      end - the end date and time
      Returns:
      a list of orders within the specified date range
